---
title: "HW_5-California Wind Turbines"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-20"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Load libraries
library(ggplot2)
library(mapdata)
library(dplyr)

# Set working directory
setwd("C:/Users/user/Desktop/HW_5_DataViz")
```

```{r california-wind-map, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# (a) Load US map data and filter California
states <- map_data("state")
california <- states %>%
  filter(region == "california")

# (b) Load wind turbine data and filter turbines in California
load("wind_turbines.rda")
wind_ca <- wind_turbines %>%
  filter(t_state == "CA")

# (c) and (d) Plot California map and wind turbines
ggplot() +
  geom_polygon(data = california,
               aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group),
               fill = "blue",
               color = "black") +
  geom_point(data = wind_ca,
             aes(x = xlong, y = ylat),
             color = "orange",
             size = 1) +
  guides(fill = "none")
```
